initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT Patient.ID, Patient.SEX, Patient.Birthday
FROM Patient
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.WBC IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY Patient.SEX, Patient.ID
ORDER BY Patient.SEX, strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) ASC
